d: Naazuk Rishto is a Sindhi-language drama that tenderly explores the fragile bonds of love and relationships within a close-knit community. Anchored by heartfelt performances, the film weaves romance and emotion into an intimate portrait of connections that are as delicate as they are defining.

Aditya Parikh and his father Bipin Chandra Parikh begin to explore the meaning of life as they meet a stranger traveler named Ketki, who takes them on a journey of surprises and realizations that strengthens their bond with every situation that tests their drifting relationship.

A group of rejected future ghosts takes shelter in a refugee camp. Marginalized by their shrinking habitat in the real world, they conjecture whether they should find a place in the virtual world or cyberspace for their survival. However, they find a very novel solution to their existential crisis at the end.

Prem Kishen, a cold-blooded hired assassin, seduces Priya to infiltrate her closely guarded family with one goal: to eliminate them. But when a shocking familial connection comes to light, the hunter becomes the protector in this gripping action thriller where loyalty and survival collide.

A star wrestler from Varanasi, secretly involved in the underworld, falls in love with Maya, a strong-willed woman living by the Ganges. But his criminal ties threaten their relationship, forcing both of them to confront love, violence, and the difficult choice between a dangerous past and a peaceful future.

A Sindhi-language drama centered on family bonds, love, and cultural values. The story unfolds through emotional relationships and life's challenges, highlighting the importance of tradition, sacrifice, and togetherness.

Juliet, a British filmmaker, sets out to explore Indian feminism through the ideals of B. R. Ambedkar, but her journey takes a deeper turn when she chooses to focus on the life and legacy of Ramabai Ambedkar.

In an isolated hospital in the high ranges of Kerala, an autistic patient with special skills piques the interest of a psychiatrist, whose investigation into her past leads to startling revelations. Directed by debutant Vivek, Athiran is a gripping thriller which stars Fahadh Faasil and Sai Pallavi in central roles.

A series of mysterious deaths in a haunted flat prompts a woman to investigate into the matter. Unbeknownst to all, an unseen presence is lurking in the shadows, ready to wreak havoc in the life of anyone who dares to move into the apartment.
An honest cop gets embroiled in a conspiracy against him, and now has just 24 hours to prove his innocence and exact vengeance upon his tormentors.
Rocketman is a one-of-a-kind musical celebration set to Elton John`s most beloved songs. Discover how a shy, small-town boy became one of the most iconic figures in rock & roll.
A man witnesses a few men threatening some old people to vacate an old aged home. He stands up to the goons to protect the building from being destroyed.

In the latest chapter of MCU`s Spider-Man series, our friendly neighborhood superhero decides to join his best friends Ned, MJ and the rest of the gang on a European vacation. However, Peter`s plans to leave heroics behind for a few weeks are quickly scrapped when he begrudgingly agrees to help Nick Fury uncover the mystery of several elemental creature attacks, creating havoc across the continent!

Terrorism has become the biggest enemy of mankind in today`s time, and we often fall prey to their inhuman acts. This is the untold story of RAW agent Panther, one of the best ever to have served our country. The film follows Panther on a solo mission to rout a terrorist group, and his journey across countries through perilous situations.

The film tells the story of a feisty Punjabi girl who is sent off track when she bumps into a depressed Mumbai businessman on an overnight train to Delhi. While attempting to get him back on board when he alights at a station stop, both are left stranded in the middle of nowhere.

Return of One Idiot, created in collaboration with Amole Gupte, watch the idiot fill your head with wonder and amazement and smash all records. An IDFC`MF`s commitment to promote the culture of saving and investing in India.
A bride`s wedding night takes a sinister turn when her eccentric new in-laws force her to play a terrifying game to officially become a part of their family.
Joker is an original, standalone story that explores Arthur Fleck, a man disregarded by society, and is not only a gritty character study but also a broader cautionary tale.

An Indian soldier is tasked with eliminating his former mentor, setting the stage for a relentless face-off. As they collide, their mission erupts into a high-stakes battle of strategy, loyalty, and firepower.

Set on the Lakshadweep islands, the film revolves around a group of people who come together to repair a large boat that belongs to the Arakkal family. Meanwhile, Ajmal, who is a part of the group, falls in love with the boatowner`s granddaughter, Jasmine. Things take a turn when a family member finds out the love story, which leads to the revelation of an old family secret.

Years after her entire family is brutally murdered for inheritance by the vicious Bhyra and his cohorts, Damayanthi returns to exact revenge on those who wronged her. Directed by Navarasan, the horror comedy thriller features Radhika Kumaraswamy in the titular role.

Chintu Tyagi is an ordinary, middle class man who finds himself torn between his wife and another woman. This remake of the classic 80`s film stars Kartik Aaryan, Ananya Panday and Bhumi Pednekar in the lead roles.
Parvathy is excited when her younger brother returns, a decade after running from home. However, things descend into chaos when he receives a threat from an unexpected foe.

Sanjana is a Hindi movie starring Javed Patel and Neelam Shah in prominent roles. It is a horror drama directed by Romy Khan.
